title: Nothing Compares 2 U
album: I Do Not Want What I Haven't Got
why_this_song: Nothing Compares 2 U by Sinéad O'Connor (1990) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: It's been so lonely without you here
Like a bird without a song
Nothing can stop these lonely tears from falling

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "nothing" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "nothing" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "compares" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "compares" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: It's been seven hours and 15 days
It's been so lonely without you here
'Cause nothing compares, nothing compares to you

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Since you took your love away
Tell me baby, where did I go wrong?
All the flowers that you planted mama

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Nothing Compares 2 U" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Nothing Compares 2 U" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Nothing Compares 2 U" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Nothing Compares 2 U"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Sinéad O'Connor one question about "Nothing Compares 2 U", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Sinéad O'Connor sobre "Nothing Compares 2 U", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
